channel.title: Hindi on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Hindi on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: ki Punjabi bolan da matlab... ?
item.description: kuch lokan di sochni eh hai k punjabi bolan da matlab hai dooji bhashavan (sab ton agge na aaunda hai Hindi da) nu pare karna hai…par nahi…eh bahut waddi galat fehmi hai…na samjhi hai…punjabi bare lokan nu aware karan da matlab eh nahi k tusi hindi nu chaddo…ehda matlab eh hai k jithe 2 punjabi khade ne oh aapis ch punjabi bolan…kyo k uhna dona di madari zubaan punjabi hai…je oh hindi ch gal karan tan eh sharam naak hai…jithe dooja banda punjabi nahi hai..uthe tuhanu kise common bhasha ch gal karni payegi & uhde ch koi problem b nahi hai…
